intent: Gate lag_memory_const_vol before another block21 repair or aggregation cycle.

selected_precondition.meaning: Candidate split is admissible only if local lag-map memory contrast is strong enough before block21 admission is tested.

must_do: Use the selected precondition as an admission gate.
Evaluate admitted and rejected positives separately.
Keep iid_const_vol, drift_const_vol and vol_only controls.
Retain iid, block5 and block21 nulls.
Report whether the gate improves robust recovery without control leakage.
must_not_do: Broaden window or split-jitter tuning before testing this gate.
Treat the precondition as a market claim.
Use the gate to issue trading advice.

retire_when: The precondition fails to keep controls below the 5% selection or robust ceiling.
The precondition does not lift admitted positive robust recovery above 70% in an independent calibration run.
A block-preserving null reproduces the admitted-positive signal.
